gaps: No test case covers welcome screen text localization for Spanish language selection.
No test case verifies that changing app language to Spanish results in correct Spanish text on the welcome/splash screen.
No test case covers welcome screen text rendering after app language change + app restart cycle.
No test case validates welcome screen text for any non-English language selection.
No test case covers the specific flow: Settings → Language → Spanish → close app → reopen → verify welcome screen text.
No test case covers localization persistence across app kill/relaunch for the welcome screen specifically.
No test case covers welcome screen text for any Romance language (Spanish, Portuguese, French, Italian) to catch cross-language mix-ups like Portuguese text appearing when Spanish is selected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-001: Spanish language selection — welcome screen text correctness (direct navigation)
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
Observe welcome/splash screen text immediately after language change (if app refreshes in-place).
If no immediate refresh, proceed to next step.
Close app (home button, then swipe to kill from recents).
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen displays text in Spanish (e.g., 'Bienvenido' or equivalent localized welcome string). Actual (If Bug): Welcome screen incorrectly displays Portuguese text (e.g., 'Bem-vindo') instead of Spanish.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-002: Spanish language selection — app kill/relaunch persistence
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
Immediately (without navigating away) force-kill the app via system settings or ADB: adb shell am force-stop com.poly.polystudiomobile
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen displays Spanish text. Actual (If Bug): Welcome screen shows Portuguese text or English text, indicating language preference was not persisted or was incorrectly mapped.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-003: Spanish language — welcome screen after phone reboot
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
After reboot, open Poly Studio Mobile app.
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen displays Spanish text. Actual (If Bug): Welcome screen shows Portuguese text, English text, or any other incorrect language, indicating language setting did not survive phone reboot.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-004: Spanish language — welcome screen after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycle
steps: Pair and connect a compatible Poly device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ UC).
Disconnect Bluetooth from quick settings or system Bluetooth menu.
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen displays Spanish text. Actual (If Bug): Welcome screen shows Portuguese text, indicating language setting was reset or corrupted during Bluetooth state transition.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-005: Spanish language — welcome screen after app backgrounding and foregrounding
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
Reopen app → verify welcome screen shows Spanish.
Press home button to background the app.
Reopen app from recents (not from launcher).
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen displays Spanish text both on cold start (step 5) and on resume from background (step 9). Actual (If Bug): Welcome screen shows Portuguese or English after resume.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-006: Spanish language — welcome screen after switching away from app and back
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
Reopen app → verify welcome screen shows Spanish.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode (or any other deep screen).
Press back repeatedly to return to welcome/splash screen.
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen displays Spanish text after navigating back from deep settings screens. Actual (If Bug): Welcome screen shows Portuguese or English after navigation.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-007: Cross-language regression — Portuguese text must NOT appear for Spanish
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
Close app (home button, kill from recents).
Close app (home button, kill from recents).
Compare both screenshots for distinct language strings.
generated_testcases.expected: Spanish selection shows Spanish welcome text (e.g., 'Bienvenido'). Portuguese selection shows Portuguese welcome text (e.g., 'Bem-vindo'). The two must NOT be identical. Actual (If Bug): Both show the same text (e.g., both show Portuguese), indicating a language mapping error where Spanish incorrectly resolves to Portuguese strings.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-008: Spanish language — welcome screen text after app update simulation
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
Simulate app data clear via: Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Clear Cache (do NOT clear data).
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen displays Spanish text. Actual (If Bug): Welcome screen shows default English or Portuguese text, indicating language preference is stored in a location that gets wiped on cache clear.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-009: Spanish language — welcome screen text after switching system language to Spanish
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
Change device system language to 'Español (Spain)' or 'Español (US)'.
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen displays Spanish text (app's internal language setting takes precedence or matches system language). Actual (If Bug): Welcome screen shows Portuguese or English, indicating conflict between app language setting and system language.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-WELCOME-010: Spanish language — welcome screen text after rapid language toggle (Spanish → English → Spanish)
steps: Set device system language to English (US).
Close app (home button, kill from recents).
Reopen app → verify Spanish welcome text.
Close app (home button, kill from recents).
Reopen app → verify English welcome text.
Close app (home button, kill from recents).
generated_testcases.expected: Welcome/splash screen correctly cycles: Spanish → English → Spanish. Final state shows Spanish text. Actual (If Bug): After toggling back to Spanish, welcome screen shows Portuguese or English, indicating state corruption during language switching.
